title: Selected Projects
schema_help: Each project can be a short object with 'id', 'title', 'role' (optional), 'description', 'tech' (array), 'link' (optional), and optional 'start'/'end' dates. Keep descriptions 1-2 sentences for CV use.

items.title: Automated CV Generator
items.description: JSON-driven LaTeX CV generator that renders a one-page PDF from structured data.
